introSection: Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Bosque Mágico in Guadalupe, Nuevo León, Mexico.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and blue supports, previously had pink track and green supports. It used to feature red track and green supports at Bobbejaanland, having yellow track and green supports before that.

fullText:
Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Bosque Mágico in Guadalupe, Nuevo León, Mexico.



Yellow track and blue supports, previously had pink track and green supports. It used to feature red track and green supports at Bobbejaanland, having yellow track and green supports before that.
